headline: Indiana defeats Miami 27-21 to complete a 16-0 season
summary: Indiana wins the CFP National Championship at Hard Rock Stadium; Fernando Mendoza is the Offensive MVP and Jamari Sharpe seals the game with an interception at :44.

headline: The January portal window reshapes Oregon and Nebraska
summary: Dylan Raiola's move from Nebraska to Oregon defines the week of post-window reaction.

headline: Michigan's coaching change becomes the carousel center
summary: Michigan moves from Sherrone Moore to Kyle Whittingham, turning the late-cycle carousel into the national story.

headline: USC signs the No. 1 recruiting class
summary: National Signing Day turns USC's winter into the issue's central hope-vs-proof argument.

headline: Spring practice opens and quarterback narratives harden
summary: Spring windows begin across the sport; Texas manages Arch Manning's limited reps while other programs sort post-portal quarterback rooms.

headline: The Moore presser becomes Michigan's hinge event
summary: Michigan's March 14 press-conference week anchors the retro Shock Index and the fanbase civil-war read.

headline: Michigan spring game spotlights the post-hire quarterback problem
summary: Kyle Whittingham's debut answers the coaching question while keeping Michigan's quarterback question in the foreground.

headline: The retro series hands off to the live NFL Draft week
summary: The next calendar event is the 2026 NFL Draft in Pittsburgh, April 23-25.
